case_title: TOMAS PENA LATIN JEWELERS VS HERNANDEZ PEDRO

docket_entries.description: INVALID SERVICE AS TO PEDRO HERNANDEZ, NOT ENOUGH DESCRIPTON OF INDIVIDUAL THAT SUBSERVICE WAS DONE ON.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOMAS PENA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ PEDRO $804.91 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $845.91 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
